name: breadcrumbs
visual_summary: Breadcrumb component used to display the navigation history, with a list of items indicating the user's position in the application
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: breadcrumbs
Description: Breadcrumb component used to display the navigation history, with a list of items indicating the user's position in the application
Style: e.g. dark, minimal
Interactions: 
Tags: navigation, history, ux

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
// packages/react/src/components/breadcrumbs/index.ts
import type {ComponentProps} from "react";

import {BreadcrumbsItem, BreadcrumbsRoot} from "./breadcrumbs";

/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
 * Compound Component
 * -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
export const Breadcrumbs = Object.assign(BreadcrumbsRoot, {
  Root: BreadcrumbsRoot,
  Item: BreadcrumbsItem,
});
